info.name: Ratepay Payment API 1.8 (Integration)
info.description:
## Ratepay Payment API 1.8 – Postman Collection (Integration)

This collection demonstrates the following Ratepay APIs:

- Payment API 1.8
    
- Transaction Status API
    

All credentials, which are by default included, are integration credentials and publicly available. The collection stores variables, based on the responses of requests - to proceed sucessfully & an easy way in follow up requests.

Further integration details can be found at [docs.ratepay.com](https://docs.ratepay.com/).

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">
    <head>
        <system-id>MyTestsystem</system-id>
        <transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>
        <operation>PAYMENT_REQUEST</operation>
        <credential>
            <profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>
            <securitycode>{{paymentApi1_securityCode}}</securitycode>
        </credential>
        <external>
            <order-id>O-1234-HDZ</order-id> 
            <merchant-consumer-id>12345</merchant-consumer-id>
        </external>
        <customer-device>
            <device-token>xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx</device-token>
        </customer-device>
    </head>
    <content>
        <customer>
            <first-name>Max</first-name>
            <last-name>Mustermann</last-name>
            <gender>M</gender>
            <date-of-birth>1982-10-31</date-of-birth>
            <ip-address>127.0.0.1</ip-address>
            <contacts>
                <email>test@test.de</email>
                <phone>
                    <direct-dial>030123456</direct-dial>
                </phone>
            </contacts>
            <addresses>
                <address type="BILLING">
                    <street>Nicht-Versenden-Straße 1</street>
                    <street-number>2</street-number>
                    <zip-code>12345</zip-code>
                    <city>Testhausen</city>
                    <country-code>DE</country-code>
                </address>
            </addresses>
            <nationality>DE</nationality>
            <customer-allow-credit-inquiry>yes</customer-allow-credit-inquiry>
        </customer>
        <shopping-basket amount="230.00" currency="EUR">
            <items>
                <item article-number="123" quantity="6" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Artikel A</item>
                <item article-number="234" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="100.00">Artikel B</item>
                <item article-number="345" quantity="2" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="50.00" discount="-10.00">Artikel C</item>
            </items>
            <discount unit-price-gross="-15.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
            <shipping unit-price-gross="5.00" tax-rate="19">Versandkosten</shipping>
        </shopping-basket>		
        <payment currency="EUR" method="INVOICE">
            <amount>230.00</amount>
        </payment>
    </content>
 </request>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">
    <head>
        <system-id>MyTestsystem</system-id>
        <transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>
        <operation>PAYMENT_REQUEST</operation>
        <credential>
            <profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>
            <securitycode>{{paymentApi1_securityCode}}</securitycode>
        </credential>
        <external>
            <order-id>O-1234-HDZ</order-id> 
            <merchant-consumer-id>12345</merchant-consumer-id>
        </external>
        <customer-device>
            <device-token>xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx</device-token>
        </customer-device>
    </head>
    <content>
		<customer>
			<first-name>Max</first-name>
			<last-name>Mustermann</last-name>
			<company-name>Test GmbH</company-name>
			<gender>U</gender>
			<ip-address>127.0.0.1</ip-address>
			<contacts>
				<email>test@test.de</email>
				<phone>
					<direct-dial>030123456</direct-dial>
				</phone>
			</contacts>
			<addresses>
				<address type="BILLING">
				    <company>Test GmbH</company>
					<street>Nicht-Versenden-Straße 1</street>
					<street-number>2</street-number>
					<zip-code>12345</zip-code>
					<city>Testhausen</city>
					<country-code>DE</country-code>
				</address>
				<address type="DELIVERY">
					<company>Test GmbH</company>
					<street>Straße der Lieferadresse</street>
					<street-number>2</street-number>
					<zip-code>54321</zip-code>
					<city>Testhausen</city>
					<country-code>DE</country-code>
				</address>
			</addresses>
			<nationality>DE</nationality>
			<customer-allow-credit-inquiry>yes</customer-allow-credit-inquiry>
			<vat-id>DE123456789</vat-id>
			<company-id>HRB 124156B</company-id>
			<registry-location>Hamburg</registry-location>
			<company-type>GMBH</company-type>
			<homepage>http://www.test-gmbh.testtld</homepage>
		</customer>
        <shopping-basket amount="230.00" currency="EUR">
            <items>
                <item article-number="123" quantity="6" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Artikel A</item>
                <item article-number="234" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="100.00">Artikel B</item>
                <item article-number="345" quantity="2" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="50.00" discount="-10.00">Artikel C</item>
            </items>
            <discount unit-price-gross="-15.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
            <shipping unit-price-gross="5.00" tax-rate="19">Versandkosten</shipping>
        </shopping-basket>		
        <payment currency="EUR" method="INVOICE">
            <amount>230.00</amount>
        </payment>
    </content>
 </request>

<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">

        <shopping-basket amount="230.00" currency="EUR">

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">
    <head>
        <system-id>MyTestsystem</system-id>
        <transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>
        <operation>PAYMENT_REQUEST</operation>
        <credential>
            <profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>
            <securitycode>{{paymentApi1_securityCode}}</securitycode>
        </credential>
        <external>
            <order-id>O-1234-HDZ</order-id> 
            <merchant-consumer-id>12345</merchant-consumer-id>
        </external>
        <customer-device>
            <device-token>xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx</device-token>
        </customer-device>
    </head>
    <content>
        <customer>
            <first-name>Max</first-name>
            <last-name>Mustermann</last-name>
            <gender>M</gender>
            <date-of-birth>1982-10-31</date-of-birth>
            <ip-address>127.0.0.1</ip-address>
            <contacts>
                <email>test@test.de</email>
                <phone>
                    <direct-dial>030123456</direct-dial>
                </phone>
            </contacts>
            <addresses>
                <address type="BILLING">
                    <street>Nicht-Versenden-Straße 1</street>
                    <street-number>2</street-number>
                    <zip-code>12345</zip-code>
                    <city>Testhausen</city>
                    <country-code>DE</country-code>
                </address>
            </addresses>
            <bank-account>
                <owner>Max Mustermann</owner>
                <iban>DE44100500001654698497</iban>
                <bic-swift>BELADEBEXXX</bic-swift>
            </bank-account>
            <nationality>DE</nationality>
            <customer-allow-credit-inquiry>yes</customer-allow-credit-inquiry>
        </customer>
        <shopping-basket amount="230.00" currency="EUR">
            <items>
                <item article-number="123" quantity="6" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Artikel A</item>
                <item article-number="234" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="100.00">Artikel B</item>
                <item article-number="345" quantity="2" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="50.00" discount="-10.00">Artikel C</item>
            </items>
            <discount unit-price-gross="-15.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
            <shipping unit-price-gross="5.00" tax-rate="19">Versandkosten</shipping>
        </shopping-basket>		
        <payment currency="EUR" method="INSTALLMENT">
            <amount>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_totalAmount}}</amount>
            <installment-details>
                <installment-number>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_numberOfRates}}</installment-number>
                <installment-amount>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_rate}}</installment-amount>
                <last-installment-amount>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_lastRate}}</last-installment-amount>
                <interest-rate>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_interestRate}}</interest-rate>
                <payment-firstday>{{paymentApi1_payIn3_paymentFirstday}}</payment-firstday>
            </installment-details>
            <debit-pay-type>DIRECT-DEBIT</debit-pay-type>
        </payment>
    </content>
 </request>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">
	<head>
		<system-id>MyTestsystem</system-id> 
		<transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>
		<operation>CONFIRMATION_DELIVER</operation>
		<credential>
			<profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>
			<securitycode>{{paymentApi1_securityCode}}</securitycode>
		</credential>
		<external>
			<order-id>O-1234-HDZ</order-id>
			<tracking>
				<id provider="DHL">02384208304</id>
			</tracking>
		</external>
		<meta>
			<systems>
				<api-version>1.8</api-version>
			</systems>
		</meta>
	</head>
	<content>
		<invoicing>
			<invoice-id>1234</invoice-id>
		</invoicing>
		<shopping-basket amount="230.00" currency="EUR">
			<items>
				<item article-number="123" quantity="6" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Artikel A</item>
				<item article-number="234" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="100.00">Artikel B</item>
				<item article-number="345" quantity="2" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="50.00" discount="-10.00">Artikel C</item>
			</items>
			<discount unit-price-gross="-15.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
			<shipping unit-price-gross="5.00" tax-rate="19">Versandkosten</shipping>
		</shopping-basket>		
	</content>
</request>

				<item article-number="234" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="90.00">Artikel B</item>
				<item article-number="345a" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="50.00" discount="-10.00">Artikel C</item>
			</items>
			<discount unit-price-gross="-15.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
			<shipping unit-price-gross="5.00" tax-rate="19">Versandkosten</shipping>
		</shopping-basket>	
	</content>
</request>

	</content>
</request>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">

		<transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>

			<profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>

		</credential>
	</head>
	<content>
		<shopping-basket amount="60.00" currency="EUR">
			<items>
				<item article-number="123" quantity="6" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Article A</item>
			</items>
		</shopping-basket>
	</content>
</request>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<request version="1.0" xmlns="urn://www.ratepay.com/payment/1_0">
	<head>
		<system-id>MyTestsystem</system-id> 
		<transaction-id>{{paymentApi1_transactionId}}</transaction-id>
		<operation subtype="return">PAYMENT_CHANGE</operation>
		<credential>
			<profile-id>{{paymentApi1_profileId}}</profile-id>
			<securitycode>{{paymentApi1_securityCode}}</securitycode>
		</credential>
	</head>
	<content>
		<shopping-basket amount="5.00" currency="EUR">
			<items>
				<item article-number="123" quantity="1" tax-rate="19" unit-price-gross="10.00">Artikel A</item>
			</items>
			<discount unit-price-gross="-5.00" tax-rate="19">Rabatt</discount>
		</shopping-basket>
	</content>
</request>

variable.description:
❗Mandatory, if Payment API 1.8 is used: Part of authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/docs/developer/api_integration/payment_1.8/payment_api_documentation/introduction/credentials

❗Mandatory, if Payment API 1.8 is used: Part of authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/docs/developer/api_integration/payment_1.8/payment_api_documentation/introduction/credentials

❗Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=client_id

❗Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=client_secret

❗Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=audience

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Request OAuth token" requests in the "Transaction Status API" folder. 
Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=response&c=200&path=access_token

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "PAYMENT_INIT" requests in the "Payment API 1.8" folder. 
Mandatory for follow up operations with Payment API 1.8.

https://docs.ratepay.com/docs/developer/api_integration/payment_1.8/payment_api_documentation/the_ratepay_gateway_operations/place_order/payment_initialization

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "CALCULATION_REQUEST" requests in the "Payment API 1.8" folder. 
Mandatory, if Pay in 3 as payment method will be used, to proceed with PAYMENT_REQUEST on Payment API 1.8.

https://docs.ratepay.com/docs/developer/api_integration/payment_1.8/payment_api_documentation/the_ratepay_gateway_operations/instalment_calculator/calculation_request
